title: Tag all AI-generated PRs with [autor] + draft + autor label
PR Recreate Pipeline v2: held-out validation on 5 new PRs
Run PR Recreate Pipeline v2 on 5 held-out merged PRs
Encode autor PR lifecycle in Python: scripts/autor_pr.py + scripts/validate_autor_pr_lifecycle.py
description:
CLAUDE.md rule (draft → score → close, never merge) is currently enforced only in prose + skill. Weak models will still call 'gh pr create' without --draft or forget to close. Encode structurally:

1. scripts/autor_pr.py — helper module
   - open_draft_autor_pr(technique, ...) — forces --draft, [autor] label, technique tag
   - close_after_score(pr, technique, score, score_json_path) — refuses to run unless score JSON exists on disk

2. scripts/validate_autor_pr_lifecycle.py — deterministic gate
   - Enumerate [autor]-labeled PRs via gh
   - Exit 1 if any: MERGED (policy violation), OPEN+not-draft (ready-for-review), OPEN+draft but no matching score artifact after grace period

3. scripts/tests/test_autor_pr_lifecycle.py — regression tests

4. autor_runner.py refactored to call scripts/autor_pr.py helpers instead of raw gh

Blast radius: same as router gate — structural, not prose.

title: PR-type → technique router (BLOCKED by matched corpus; gate-enforced)
description:
Do not start until python3 scripts/validate_router_prereqs.py exits 0 AND oracle-router effect-size ≥ 2 points over 'always pick highest-mean technique'.

Rule encoded in:
- CLAUDE.md (llm-wiki-autor-phase3) → 'Router Prerequisite Gate (MANDATORY before any router work)'
- scripts/validate_router_prereqs.py (landed in PR #6)

If gate passes with reversals < 2 → kill this bead with a null-result synthesis, do not build router.

title: dumb-agent: run SR/ET/PRM × 3 samples each on PR #6265 (15 total) via scripts/autor_pr.py
Analyze PR Recreate v1+v2+v3 combined results (n=10 SelfRefine, n=5 ET)
notes: v3 complete: 6 new draft autor PRs (6318-6324). Combined n=10 SelfRefine (87.0), n=5 ET (86.9), n=4 PRM (87.25). Key finding: all 3 techniques converge to ~87. SelfRefine most consistent (stddev lowest). ET high variance (76.5-93). Wiki updated: wiki/syntheses/cycle_pr-recreate-v1.md.

title: rev-v4ci05: Resolve 3 behavioral equivalence gaps before redirecting world_logic call sites
description: BehavioralEquivalenceAudit: 0/3 world_logic/rewards_engine pairs equivalent. 3 gaps: _should_emit vs should_show (game_state cross-check), _enforce_rewards_box_planning_atomicity vs _enforce_atomicity (rich vs minimal), _project_level_up_ui_from_game_state vs project_level_up_ui (return type mismatch). rev-v4ci01 blocked until resolved.
notes: PR #6329 assessment complete: MERGEABLE — gold/loot cascade fix is correct, all 263 tests pass on main, no world_logic.py conflicts. CR CHANGES_REQUESTED is auto-triggered by design gate (no body). No blockers on code quality. Recommend: merge if CR dismisses.

title: Matched-PR corpus: 5 PRs × 3 techniques × n=3 runs per cell (45 total)
description:
Blocks br-5bj router work via scripts/validate_router_prereqs.py.

Scope (higher n per cell than minimum gate threshold):
- 5 PRs chosen for type diversity (bug fix, refactor, feature, test-only, docs)
- 3 techniques: SelfRefine, Extended Thinking, PRM
- 3 independent runs per (PR, technique) cell → 45 total evaluation runs

Schema update:
- rubric_scores["<pr>"]["<technique>"] = [score_row_1, score_row_2, score_row_3]
- Each row: commit_sha, run_session, 6-dim breakdown, total
- build_matched_table in scripts/validate_router_prereqs.py updated to aggregate by cell mean

Deliverables:
- research-wiki/plans/matched_corpus_prs.md (5 PRs justified)
- 45 score JSONs under research-wiki/scores/ + 45 logs under wiki/syntheses/et_logs/
- technique_bandit/bandit_state.json with explicit technique fields and n=3 per cell
- scripts/validate_router_prereqs.py → exit 0 OR documented null result

Gate unblocks → Oracle-router effect-size check is next (≥2 point uplift required before real router build).
